title: Book Reviews
abstract: Handbook of Family Measurement Techniques. John Touliatos, Barry F. Perlmutter, and Murray A. Straus. Handbook of Family Development and Intervention. William Nichols, Mary Anne Pace‐Nichols, Dorothy Becvar, and Augustus Napier (Eds.). Celebrating the Family: Ethnicity, Consumer Culture and Family Ritual. Elizabeth Pleck. Making Babies, Making Families: What Matters Most in an Age of Reproductive Technologies, Surrogacy, Adoption, and Same Sex and Unwed Parents. Mary Lyndon Shanley. Black Working Wives: Pioneers of the American Family Revolution. Bart Landry. Elder Abuse in the Family: An Interdisciplinary Model for Research. Frances Merchant Carp. Parental Grief: Narratives of Loss and Relationship. Paul C. Rosenblatt.
